Experience

Healthcare Assistant, Example NHS Foundation Trust (2022 - Present)
- Provided patient care and support on a busy ward
- Assisted with moving and handling of patients
- Maintained accurate documentation and care plans

Support Worker - Example Care Homes Ltd (2019 to 2022)
- Delivered personal care to residents with dementia
- Supported safeguarding processes

Communication, Patient care, Medication administration
